name: Kwanyama
notes: Kwanyama (Oshikwanyama / Kuanyama) — Bantu language of northern Namibia and southern Angola, one of the two written standards of Ovambo. Written in the Latin script. GRAPHEME INVENTORY NOT YET SPECIFIED: the Kwanyama orthography and phoneme inventory (including prenasalised stops, the ⟨sh⟩/⟨tsh⟩ digraphs and tone, which is not written) need documented sourcing before a letter→phoneme table can be asserted. INPUT CONTRACT: input is expected in the Latin-script Kwanyama orthography.
